hyperedges.label: Cloud Functions + Resend Email Delivery System
Platform-conditional CSV export (native via share_plus, web via dart:html)
Cross-cutting utility layer (error handling, formatting, platform detection, responsiveness)
All widgets consume the 3-layer design token architecture
Shared reusable widget library in lib/widgets/
Test infrastructure: mock stores, HTTP overrides, test app wrapper, fake snapshots
Store Test Suite using Seed Simulation Pattern
Utility Test Suite (formatters, platform, responsive, error, csv)

nodes.label: Pet Circle Product Requirements Document v2.0
Design System Migration v1 to v2
Rationale: AuthGate Scope (auth state only, not business logic)
Rationale: Design System Migration from Neumorphic to Flat/Token
Rationale: OTP over Magic Links (stay in-app)
Rationale: Invited Users Skip Pet-Creation Onboarding
Rationale: Trusted pendingInvites on Pet Document
Accessibility tests for PrimaryButton and BottomNavBar
Access Control Resolution (ownerId > UID > email > name)
